recent_calls.summary: The user called to set up an appointment for a line check and possibly adding Freon to their cooling system at their property in Saint Peters, Missouri. The agent successfully booked the appointment for the next available Friday at 2 PM and collected feedback from the user, who expressed dissatisfaction with not being informed initially that they were speaking with an AI assistant. The call ended with the appointment confirmed and the user thanked the agent.
The user requested to speak to a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The agent greeted the user and asked for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up shortly after without responding.

Mark called Budget to report that his air conditioner stopped working and requested an immediate callback. The agent confirmed his contact details and service address, and informed him that someone would reach out shortly. Mark declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user called to schedule an HVAC system installation and successfully booked an appointment for April 24th at 8 AM. The user expressed dissatisfaction with the AI assistant and requested to speak with a live person, leading to a call transfer. The agent confirmed the booking and attempted to improve the user's experience by transferring the call to a live agent.

Carl Williams called to report an issue with ice freezing on his air conditioner and furnace. He requested a service appointment for the same day, confirmed he is the owner, and declined information about maintenance programs. The call ended with the agent transferring him to a live agent for further assistance.

Jessie called to speak with a representative who had previously contacted her about scheduling an appointment, but she needed to discuss an issue with an incorrect thermostat adjustment made by a technician. The agent documented her concern and informed her that a representative would call her back when the office opens. Jessie declined further assistance and ended the call.

Ida Brooks called to inquire about a scheduled routine furnace cleaning appointment at 8 AM that had not yet occurred. She emphasized the importance of the technician arriving on time as she needs to leave for work by 9 AM and requested updates if there are any delays. The agent confirmed her details, noted her preference, and assured that the team would follow up with her soon.

Mark called Budget's after-hours assistant, Evie, to report that his air conditioner stopped running and requested urgent service for the same day. The agent confirmed his contact details and service address, noted that the issue was uncomfortable but not an emergency, and collected feedback on the call experience. The team will follow up the next business day to confirm service availability.

The user called to confirm the time of a scheduled cooling service appointment at 2808 McNair. The agent confirmed the callback number and service details, and the user declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests. The agent assured that the team would call back with the appointment time.

The user called to make an appointment for AC unit service and preferred a visit tomorrow at 4 PM. The agent explained the regular business hours and that immediate attention might not be available after hours. The user requested to speak to a human but was informed that a callback would be arranged during business hours.

The user, Colton Bone, called to cancel and reschedule his cooling system appointment due to an emergency requiring him to leave town. The appointment was rescheduled for Monday at 8 AM, and the issue with the cooling system was noted as not cooling completely and starting to leak. The agent confirmed all details with the user before ending the call.

Jessie Walker called to follow up on a service request for their air conditioner, which is running loud. The agent confirmed the issue and scheduled the soonest available appointment between 8 AM and 12 PM on a weekday. The call concluded with Jessie declining to provide feedback.
The call was very brief and the user hung up immediately after the agent introduced herself. No further conversation or assistance took place.

Susan called to return a call regarding her furnace and requested a callback as soon as possible. The agent confirmed her contact details and noted that she was not interested in home maintenance programs. The call ended with the agent confirming no further questions and Susan declining to provide feedback.

The user called to schedule a service appointment for an air pump air condenser unit under warranty due to water leaking and a tripped breaker. The agent collected the service address and noted the request for the earliest possible appointment, informing the user that the team will confirm availability the next business day.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and offering assistance, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called after hours to inquire about their appointment time for the next day. The virtual assistant informed the user that appointment details are not accessible after hours but assured that the team will contact them the next business day. The user requested a callback in the morning, which the assistant confirmed would be arranged.

Sophia and Ken Hunter called to report an urgent air conditioning issue where the unit is not cooling, has a damaged line, low Freon, and is freezing up. The agent documented the emergency, noting the presence of vulnerable family members, and initiated an emergency workflow for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended with the user expressing gratitude and no further assistance requested.

The user called to set up the installation of an air conditioner after approving the estimate. The agent scheduled the installation for Monday the twentieth at 8 AM at 15 Sunbeam Court, Saint Peters, and confirmed the user's contact details. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call politely.
The user called and requested to speak with Daniel. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

Dorothy called to confirm an appointment for annual maintenance and a cooling issue check for her cooling system. The agent reviewed the details and attempted to book the appointment for Monday at noon, but the booking failed due to a scheduling conflict. The agent assured Dorothy that a human agent would follow up to confirm availability.
The user, Brenda, called and requested to speak with someone. The agent, Sophie, attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

Theresa from Gusto called Budget to reach Nick but he was unavailable. She left a detailed message for Nick regarding a check-in on Budget's first year with Gusto and the setup of tools, including her direct contact information. The agent confirmed the message and the call ended politely.

The user, Shameeka, was initially connected to Sophie from Budget but was transferred to a live agent after the user indicated they did not get an answer previously. The transfer was completed successfully.
The user called to return a call and set up an appointment for their AC to be looked at. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called Budget to inquire about a delivery to the shop. The agent identified herself and asked for details to direct the message appropriately, but the call ended shortly after without further information.
The user called to return a phone call and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user returned a call from Budget and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
No conversation happened.

The user, Dorothy, called to schedule an annual maintenance visit and report an issue with her air conditioning not cooling well. The agent collected her service details and preferred time for the appointment, but the booking could not be confirmed immediately due to a scheduling conflict. A human agent will follow up to confirm the appointment and availability.
The user was frustrated and wanted to speak to a human agent instead of the AI. The agent attempted to assist but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent as requested.
The user requested to speak with Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate person successfully. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Ernest Green called to schedule an air conditioning service to switch his system from winter to summer mode. The agent confirmed the details and booked an appointment for Monday, April 27, 2026, at 12 PM. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback but confirming the appointment.
The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting. The user hung up almost immediately without engaging in conversation.

Anne Moe called to schedule an estimate for a water softener installation, confirming the appointment for April 27th at any time. The agent confirmed the details and informed Anne that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her shortly. Anne expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs but declined to provide feedback.

Kathryn called to schedule a routine heating and air conditioning checkup as part of the AHS special. The agent collected her information and noted her preference for a morning appointment within the next week or two, informing her that a Budget representative would contact her to confirm the exact date. Kathryn declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user, John Coleman, called to inquire about an appointment but the agent could not find any appointment in the system. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call.

The agent, Sophie, contacted Aubrey Cox regarding a previous outreach about a bathroom or office issue. Aubrey was unsure about the details and decided to have his wife call back for more information. The call ended with no further assistance provided.

The user called to cancel an appointment scheduled for Monday, April twentieth, due to financial reasons. The agent confirmed the cancellation and assured the user that the cancellation request would be sent to avoid any charges. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further assistance needed.
The user called Budget and requested to be transferred to a human representative. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user called Budget and asked to speak with Amy. The agent, Sophie, confirmed her identity and then transferred the call to a live agent named Amy as requested.

The user called to follow up on an air conditioning service request and provided detailed information including service address, contact details, and home warranty dispatch number. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that a technician would contact the property manager to arrange access. The user expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs.

Rick Lang called to reschedule his preseason air conditioning evaluation appointment. The agent confirmed details and attempted to book a slot for May 5th, but no availability was found, so they discussed May 12th. The call ended with the user requesting to speak to a live agent, and the call was transferred accordingly.

Claudia from American Home Shield called to get an update on a member's air conditioner service request. The agent confirmed the issue details and service preference, and the call ended with the user declining to provide feedback. The call was completed successfully without issues.

The user, Calia from American Home Shield, called to inquire about the out-of-pocket cost for a customer related to a specific dispatch number. The agent informed her that exact pricing could not be provided during the call but assured that a licensed technician or billing specialist would follow up. The user declined to provide a phone number for follow-up and ended the call shortly after.

The user called to speak with Daniel Lagars regarding a drain pan issue on their year-old HVAC system that is not covered under warranty. They sought clarification on why the warranty does not cover it, suspecting faulty installation or a bad part. The agent confirmed the details and arranged for Daniel to return the call at the user's preferred times.
